### Fix 1
Line: 116
Rule [family:Select]:
## Select Family Migration

Target structure (correct v6 composition):
```jsx
  <Select activeItemId={...} activeMenu={...} containsDrilldown={...} containsFlyout={...} drilldownItemPath={...} drilledInMenus={...} focusTimeoutDelay={...} id={...}>
    <SelectList isAriaMultiselectable={...}>
      <SelectOption actions={...} component={...} description={...} direction={...} download={...} drilldownMenu={...} flyoutMenu={...} hasCheckbox={...}>
        <SelectList />
        <Select />
      </SelectOption>
    </SelectList>
    <SelectGroup innerRef={...} label={...} labelHeadingLevel={...} titleId={...} />
  </Select>
```

Props that stay on <Select>: activeItemId, activeMenu, containsDrilldown, containsFlyout, drilldownItemPath, drilledInMenus, focusTimeoutDelay, id, innerRef, isMenuDrilledIn, isNavFlyout, isOpen, isPlain, isRootMenu, isScrollable, maxMenuHeight, menuHeight, onActionClick, onDrillIn, onDrillOut, onGetMenuHeight, onOpenChange, onOpenChangeKeys, onSelect, onToggleKeydown, ouiaId, ouiaSafe, parentMenu, popperProps, role, selected, shouldFocusFirstItemOnOpen, shouldFocusToggleOnSelect, shouldPreventScrollOnItemFocus, toggle, variant, zIndex

Add imports: SelectGroup, SelectList, SelectOption from '@patternfly/react-core'

Prop type changes:

  onSelect: (event?: React.MouseEvent<Element, MouseEvent>, value?: string | number) => void -> (event?: React.MouseEvent<Element, MouseEvent>, value?: SelectOptionProps['value']) => void
  onSelect: (event?: React.MouseEvent<Element, MouseEvent>, value?: string | number) => void -> (event?: React.MouseEvent<Element, MouseEvent>, value?: SelectOptionProps['value']) => void
  popperProps: SelectPopperProps -> PopperOptions
  popperProps: SelectPopperProps -> PopperOptions

  New import: @patternfly/react-core

### Fix 2
Line: 131
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-helpertextitem]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <HelperTextItem> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <HelperTextItem> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <HelperTextItem variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></HelperTextItem>
  After:  <HelperTextItem variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <HelperTextItem> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <HelperTextItem><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</HelperTextItem>
  After:  <HelperTextItem icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</HelperTextItem>

Incident context:
  componentName: HelperTextItem
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: PfHelperText

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: HelperTextItem
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
  130                  <PfHelperText>
  131                    <HelperTextItem>
  132                      {t(

```

### Fix 3
Line: 80
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-menutoggle]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <MenuToggle> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <MenuToggle> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <MenuToggle variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></MenuToggle>
  After:  <MenuToggle variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <MenuToggle> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <MenuToggle><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</MenuToggle>
  After:  <MenuToggle icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</MenuToggle>

Incident context:
  componentName: MenuToggle
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: __ComponentReturn__

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: MenuToggle
Prop: icon

```

   80      <MenuToggle
   81        ref={toggleRef}

```

### Fix 4
Line: 6
Rule [sd-test-select-transitive-behavioral-changes]:
Select is affected by behavioral changes in rendered sub-components:
- Select renders Popper which has a behavioral change: Default value for 'appendTo' prop on Popper changed from 'inline' to () => document.body

Tests for Select may need updating. Fix options depend on the specific change:
- For portal changes: use waitFor(), popperProps=, or within(document.body)
- For role/DOM changes: update getByRole() queries to match new roles
- For attribute changes: update querySelector/getAttribute calls

  localName: Select
  module: @patternfly/react-core


Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/odf-console/source/packages/odf/components/create-storage-system/create-storage-system-steps/capacity-and-nodes-step/stretch-cluster.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me analyze each fix:

**Fix 1 (Line 116):** `onSelect` prop type changed on `Select`. The `handleSelection` already uses `SelectProps['onSelect']` typing (line 74), which will automatically pick up the new type from the v6 import. The `Select` component is already using the v6 API (with `SelectList`, `SelectOption`, `toggle`, `onOpenChange`, `selected`). The `onSelect` usage at line 116 is already correct for v6. The `SelectProps['onSelect']` type reference at line 74 and 147 will automatically resolve to the new signature. **No change needed** — the code already uses v6 Select API.

**Fix 2 (Line 131):** `HelperTextItem` — icon children to prop. But looking at lines 131-135, the `HelperTextItem` contains only text (a translation string), NOT an icon. There's no icon element inside this `HelperTextItem`. **No change needed.**

**Fix 3 (Line 80):** `MenuToggle` — icon children to prop. Looking at lines 80-87, the `MenuToggle` contains text (`{arbiterLocation || t('Select an arbiter zone')}`), NOT an icon. **No change needed.**

**Fix 4 (Line 6):** `Select` behavioral change note about Popper `appendTo`. This is informational about test files — no code change to the source file itself. **No change needed.**

**Fix 5 (Line 16):** `TextVariants` → `ContentVariants`. Need to replace the import and all usages.

**Fix 6 (Line 17):** `Text` → `Content`. Need to replace the import and all JSX usages.

**Fix 7 (Line 15):** `TextContent` → `Content`. Need to replace the import and all JSX usages.

Fixes 5, 6, 7 together: Replace `TextContent`, `TextVariants`, and `Text` with `Content` and `ContentVariants`. The `Content` component replaces both `TextContent` and `Text`. In v6, `<TextContent><Text component={TextVariants.h3}>...</Text></TextContent>` becomes `<Content component={ContentVariants.h3}>...</Content>`.

Let me trace the usages:
- Line 31-37: `<TextContent><Text component={TextVariants.small}>...</Text></TextContent>`
- Line 92-94: `<TextContent><Text component={TextVariants.h3}>...</Text></TextContent>`

In v6, `<Content>` replaces both `<TextContent>` (the wrapper) and `<Text>` (the inline element). The `component` prop moves to `<Content>`.

So:
- `<TextContent><Text component={TextVariants.small}>text</Text></TextContent>` → `<Content component={ContentVariants.small}>text</Content>`
- `<TextContent><Text component={TextVariants.h3}>text</Text></TextContent>` → `<Content component={ContentVariants.h3}>text</Content>`

Now let me apply all changes:

arguments.after:
<Content component={ContentVariants.small}>
        {t(
          'To support high availability when two data centers can be used, enable arbiter to get a valid quorum between the two data centers.'
        )}
      </Content>
arguments.before:
<TextContent>
        <Text component={TextVariants.small}>
          {t(
            'To support high availability when two data centers can be used, enable arbiter to get a valid quorum between the two data centers.'
          )}
        </Text>
      </TextContent>

content.text: Now let me verify the final file looks correct:

The file looks correct. Let me verify all the changes are consistent:

1. **Imports** (lines 15-16): `TextContent`, `TextVariants`, `Text` replaced with `Content`, `ContentVariants` ✓
2. **Line 30**: `<TextContent><Text component={TextVariants.small}>` collapsed to `<Content component={ContentVariants.small}>` ✓
3. **Line 34**: Closing tags collapsed from `</Text></TextContent>` to `</Content>` ✓
4. **Line 89**: `<TextContent><Text component={TextVariants.h3}>` collapsed to `<Content component={ContentVariants.h3}>` and closing tags similarly ✓
5. No stale imports remain — `TextContent`, `TextVariants`, `Text` are all removed ✓
6. `SelectProps['onSelect']` at lines 71 and 142 will automatically resolve to the v6 type signature ✓

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Details |
|-----|------|--------|---------|
| **Fix 1** (Line 116) | Select `onSelect` type change | **Already correct** | The code already uses v6 Select API with `SelectList`, `SelectOption`, `toggle`, `onOpenChange`, `selected`. The `SelectProps['onSelect']` type reference (lines 71, 142) automatically resolves to the new v6 signature. No code change needed. |
| **Fix 2** (Line 131) | HelperTextItem icon-to-prop | **No change needed** | The `HelperTextItem` at this location contains only a text string (translation), not an icon element. The rule does not apply here. |
| **Fix 3** (Line 80) | MenuToggle icon-to-prop | **No change needed** | The `MenuToggle` at this location contains only text (`{arbiterLocation || t('Select an arbiter zone')}`), not an icon element. The rule does not apply here. |
| **Fix 4** (Line 6) | Select behavioral/test change | **No change needed** | Informational rule about Popper `appendTo` default change. This is a source file, not a test file. No code change required. |
| **Fix 5** (Line 16) | `TextVariants` → `ContentVariants` | **Applied** | Replaced import `TextVariants` with `ContentVariants`. Updated all JSX usages: `TextVariants.small` → `ContentVariants.small`, `TextVariants.h3` → `ContentVariants.h3`. |
| **Fix 6** (Line 17) | `Text` → `Content` | **Applied** | Removed `Text` import (now using `Content`). Replaced `<Text component={...}>` with `<Content component={...}>` at two locations (lines 30 and 89), collapsing the `TextContent`/`Text` wrapper pair into a single `Content` element. |
| **Fix 7** (Line 15) | `TextContent` → `Content` | **Applied** | Removed `TextContent` import, added `Content`. Removed `<TextContent>` wrapper elements at two locations — the wrapper is no longer needed since `<Content>` replaces both `<TextContent>` and `<Text>`. |
